# MinDraft Sample

A small fixture for local development.

## Features

- Preview-first reading
- Block navigation
- Math: $E = mc^2$
- Mermaid diagrams

```mermaid
graph LR
  A[Read] --> B[Edit lightly]
  B --> C[Share]
```

## Checklist

- [x] Open `.md` files
- [x] Edit blocks with `i`
- [ ] Ship release
